github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: Always use TypeScript strict mode. Use interface for domain types, type for unions. No any — use unknown.
All work-time calculation logic must go in app/lib/calculations.ts only.
Use React Router v7 loader/action for all data fetching and mutations. Never fetch in components with useEffect.
UI text, labels, error messages must be in Vietnamese. Code (variables, functions, types) must be in English.
Use Tailwind CSS v4 classes only. No inline styles. Use cn() helper (clsx + tailwind-merge) for conditional classNames.
Date stored as 'YYYY-MM-DD' string, time as 'HH:mm' string. Default timezone: Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh.
Every route file must export a meta() function.

github.copilot.chat.testGeneration.instr.text: Test all functions in app/lib/calculations.ts with edge cases: missing check-in/out, overnight shifts, lunch break overlap, early/late boundaries.
